MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-25-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-12-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion Of Defendant To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Further Responses To Defendants Form Interrogatories, Set One; And For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Marc C. Gessford (Ccp 2030.300 & Ccp 2023.030(A))
Off Calendar Apr-13-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ROBERT WARGO, Esq. of Wilshire Law Firm (Tel: 213-381-9988) for plaintiff;
Atty. MARC GESSFORD, Esq. of Sims, Lawrence & Broghammer (Tel: 916-797-8881) for defendant Kiyoon Ko.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT KIYOON KO's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Further Responses To Defendants Form Interrogatories, Set One; And For Sanctions.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Parties to meet and confer on a proposed order which leaves the amount for award of sanctions blank, and submit the proposed order in Word format to the pro tem judge by noon today at peter.catalanotti@wilsonelser.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Kiyoon Ko For Order Compelling Plaintiff Jonathan Yu To Attend A Second Independent Medical Examination In The Form Of An Orthopedic Medical Examination; Declaration Of Marc C. Gessford (Ccp 2032.310)
Off Calendar Mar-23-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Robert Wargo, Esq. 213-381-9988 Wilshire Law Firm for Plaintiff.
Marc Gessford, Esq. 916-797-8881 Sims Lawrence & Broghammer for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

RULING - A R G U E D. Both sides argue IME. Mr. Wargo requests questioning be limited since it is too broad. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT KIYOON KO's Motion Of Defendant Kiyoon Ko For Order Compelling Plaintiff Jonathan Yu To Attend A Second Independent Medical Examination In The Form Of An Orthopedic Medical Examination.

The motion is granted, the scope is taken under submission. Mr. Gessford to submit a proposed order in word and e-mail it to jpdeol@dhillonlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
